candidates.why: Best match for top-line sales/revenue; specific operating revenue line and populated across years.
Also a revenue line, but appears to be a total duplicating Revenue from Goods & Services.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list, with the more specific non-total line first.

candidates.why: Best direct match for cost of sales/cost of revenue.
Also matches COGS but appears to duplicate Cost of Operating Revenue.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Revenue including Operation & Maintenance (Utility) - Total
candidates.why: Also duplicates the main cost of revenue total.

variables.notes: Selected the primary direct cost row and avoided duplicate total rows.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row and already excludes R&D, which is ideal for PROF SG&A handling.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses including Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Overhead component within SG&A, but inferior to the explicit SG&A row because rule prefers the explicit populated SG&A line.
Could capture overhead broadly, but too broad and inferior to explicit SG&A.

final_choice.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses

variables.notes: Explicit populated SG&A row exists, so selected only that row per hierarchy rule. It already excludes R&D.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: R&D-related wording exists, but this is amortization of capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Indicates R&D may exist conceptually, but this is not an R&D expense row.

variables.notes: No dedicated R&D expense line is visible on the income statement. The only R&D-related line is amortization of capitalized R&D, which should not be used as current R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best match for recurring interest expense.
Also a strong match, but appears to duplicate Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Recurring finance cost component, but likely already included in total interest expense; selecting it too would risk double counting.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Used the most explicit recurring interest expense row and avoided duplicate/component double counting.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent parent-only equity line and suitable fallback if label changes.
Also appears to represent parent/common equity excluding NCI.
Another common-equity label that appears to exclude minority interest.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Provided parent/common equity labels as a priority list to exclude minority interest from BE.

candidates.why: Direct balance sheet non-controlling interest line.
Also a direct minority interest label and suitable fallback.

variables.notes: Using balance sheet minority interest labels as a priority list.
